steps.title: Identify conversion factors
steps.content:
To convert m/s² to miles/min²:
  • Meters to miles: divide by 1,609
  • Seconds squared to minutes squared: multiply by 3,600 (since 1 minute = 60 seconds, so 1 min² = 3,600 s²)

steps.title: Apply conversions and calculate
steps.content:
Multiply: $$1.1 \times \frac{3,600}{1,609} = \frac{3,960}{1,609} \approx 2.46$$
Rounded to the nearest tenth: \$2.5$ miles/min². That matches choice B — B is correct.
